evals.name: basic-chinese-search
evals.prompt: 帮我搜索一下「人工智能 最新进展」，找出最近5条相关新闻
evals.expected_output: Should return 5 search results about AI in Chinese, formatted with title, source, URL, and summary

evals.name: time-filtered-news
evals.prompt: 搜索今天的科技新闻，只看今天的内容
evals.expected_output: Should use time_range='1d' or 'today' to filter results from today

evals.name: webpage-fetch
evals.prompt: 抓取这个网页的完整内容：https://www.thepaper.cn/
evals.expected_output: Should use web_fetch to get full page content, return title and main content
